name: subagent-mcp
description: MCP server that launches and manages local Claude Code and Codex CLI sub-agents as child processes (no direct Anthropic/OpenAI API).

scripts.test: node test/effort.test.mjs && node test/platform.test.mjs && node test/wait.test.mjs && node test/status.test.mjs && node test/output.test.mjs && node test/stream.test.mjs && node test/routing.test.mjs && node test/handler-validation.test.mjs && node test/index-handler.test.mjs && node test/orchestration-marker.test.mjs && node test/orchestration-hook-core.test.mjs && node test/orchestration-adapters.test.mjs && node test/orchestration-directives.test.mjs && node scripts/validate_provider.mjs && node scripts/validate_seed_sites.mjs && node scripts/validate_routing_audit.mjs && node test/seed-sites.test.mjs

author: Lexi Blackburn
